name: Inaba Foods Cat Treat Grilled Chicken Extra Tender In Crab Flavored Broth
shortDescription: Premium Inaba grilled chicken cat treats in crab flavored broth. Extra-tender, grain-free, and enriched with Vitamin E & antioxidants. Suitable for all life stages.
description: Treat your cat to the savory goodness of Inaba Foods Grilled Chicken in Crab Flavored Broth , a premium, hand-cut chicken fillet made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients. Each extra-tender fillet is lightly grilled and packed in a flavorful crab broth to help lock in moisture, keeping your feline hydrated and satisfied. Crafted from farm-raised chicken and enriched with Vitamin E for immunity and Green Tea Extract for antioxidants, these treats are free from grains, preservatives, and artificial colors. Each fillet is vacuum-sealed in UV-blocking packaging to maintain freshness and flavor. Perfect for handfeeding, topping wet or dry food, or offering as a special reward, these tender chicken fillets provide variety and excitement for cats of all life stages, from kittens to seniors. Key Benefits . Made with farm-raised chicken . Moisture-rich crab broth supports hydration . Grain-free, preservative-free, and no artificial colors . Enriched with Vitamin E & Green Tea Extract antioxidants . Perfect for handfeeding, topper, or treat . Vacuum-sealed for freshness . Suitable for kittens, adults, and senior cats Ingredients Chicken, Natural Crab Flavored Broth, Tapioca, Collagen, Guar Gum, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 18.0% Crude Fat (min): 0.8% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 75% Vitamin E (min): 18 IU/kg Calories: 1118 kcal/kg | 28 kcal per piece Net Weight: 0.9 oz per fillet Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Provide fresh water daily. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly for maximum freshness.
